generated_comment: Yaar, sometimes I just don't get it. Wife ho ya office mein female staff, choti si baat pe bhi itna drama karte hain. Mood swings ka pata hi nahi chalta. Pura hormonal game hai boss, kya karein.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment attributes women's 'drama' and 'mood swings' to a 'hormonal game,' dismissing their emotional states as biologically determined and thus irrational. It directly aligns with the surface manifestation of characterizing a woman's frustration as 'hormonal' to dismiss it.
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 48. Married. A businessman in Ahmedabad. You are having dinner with your wife after your close friend called earlier today to say his wife just found out he has been having an affair with a woman from his gym for eight months. Your wife is upset about it. You are telling her your take on the situation and specifically what role you think the woman from the gym played and why you think women like her deliberately target married men.
